hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 1. Jābir b. Yazīd, al-Juʿfī, al-Kūfī
hadiths.ar: 1 - جابر بن يزيد، الجعفي، الكوفي. ثقة في نفسه. ولكن جل من يروي عنه ضعيف، فممن أكثر عنه من الضعفاء، عمرو بن شمر الجعفي، ومفضل بن صالح، والسكوني، ومنخل بن جميل الأسدي.
hadiths.en: 1 – Jābir b. Yazīd, al-Juʿfī, al-Kūfī.  Thiqa in himself, however most of those who narrate from him are weak.  Of those who (narrate) the most from him of the weak narrators, there are: ʿAmr b. Shimr al-Juʿfī, Mufaḍḍal b. Ṣāliḥ, al-Sakūnī, and Munakhkhal b. Jamīl al-Asadī.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 1, H. 161
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: Jābir b. Yazīd, al-Juʿfī, al-Kūfī
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Jābir b. Yazīd, al-Juʿfī, al-Kūfī

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 2. al-Ḥusayn b. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn
hadiths.ar: 2 - الحسين بن القاسم بن محمد بن أيوب بن شمون. ضعفوه. وهو عندي ثقة. ولكن بحث في من يروي عنه. وكان أبوه القاسم من وجوه الشيعة، ولكن لم يرو شيئا.
hadiths.en: 2 – al-Ḥusayn b. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn.  They have weakened him, but according to me he is thiqa.  However there is discussion in regards to those who narrate from him.  And his father, al-Qāsim, was from the noteworthy of the Shīʿa, however nothing has been narrated from him.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 2, H. 162
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: al-Ḥusayn b. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › al-Ḥusayn b. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 3. Ḥabīb b. Aws, Abū Tammām, al-Ṭā’ī
hadiths.ar: 3 - حبيب بن أوس، أبو تمام، الطائي. رأيت نسخة عتيقة لعلها كتبت له في أيامه أو قريبا منها، فيها قصيدة يذكر فيها الأئمة (عليهم السلام) حتى انتهى إلى أبي جعفر الثاني (عليه السلام) لأنه توفي في أيامه.
hadiths.en: 3 – Ḥabīb b. Aws, Abū Tammām, al-Ṭā’ī.  I have seen an ancient manuscript that might have been written for him in his time or close to it.  In it, there is an poem (qaṣīda) mentioning the Imams عليهم السbم in it until it reaches Abū Jaʿfar the Second  عليه السلام , since he died during his time.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 3, H. 163
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: Ḥabīb b. Aws, Abū Tammām, al-Ṭā’ī
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Ḥabīb b. Aws, Abū Tammām, al-Ṭā’ī

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 4. Ibn ʿUqda
hadiths.ar: 4 - ابن عقدة. هو من الزيدية، لكن حديثه يجيئ في حديث أصحابنا.
hadiths.en: 4 – Ibn ʿUqda.  He is from the Zaydīs, however his ḥadīth come in the ḥadīth of our companions.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 4, H. 164
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: Ibn ʿUqda
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Ibn ʿUqda

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 5. ʿUmar b. Abī al-Miqdām, Thābit al-ʿIjlī
hadiths.ar: 5 - عمر بن أبي المقدام، ثابت العجلي مولاهم، الكوفي. روى عن علي بن الحسين، (وأبي جعفر، وأبي عبد الله (عليهم السلام)) طعنوا عليه من جهة، وليس عندي كما زعموا. وهو عندي ثقة.
hadiths.en: 5 - ʿUmar b. Abī al-Miqdām, Thābit al-ʿIjlī, their client, al-Kūfī.  He narrated from ʿAlī b. alḤusayn [and Abū Jaʿfar and Abū ʿAbdillāh عليهم السbم ].  (Scholars) have accused him on the one hand, but according to me he is not as they have claimed, and according to me he is thiqa.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 5, H. 165
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: ʿUmar b. Abī al-Miqdām, Thābit al-ʿIjlī
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › ʿUmar b. Abī al-Miqdām, Thābit al-ʿIjlī

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 6. Layth b. al-Bakhtarī al-Murādī, Abū Baṣīr
hadiths.ar: 6 - ليث بن البختري، المرادي، أبو بصير، يكنى أبا محمد. كان أبو عبد الله (عليه السلام) يتضجر به ويتبرم، وأصحابه مختلفون في شأنه. وعندي أن الطعن إنما وقع على دينه، لا على حديثه، وهو عندي ثقة.
hadiths.en: 6 – Layth b. al-Bakhtarī al-Murādī, Abū Baṣīr, known by the kunya of Abū Muḥammad.  Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام used to be displeased with him and be fed up (with him).  And his companions are at variance regarding his state.  According to me, the accusation is only occurred against his religion, not against his ḥadīth, and according to me he is thiqa.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 6, H. 166
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: Layth b. al-Bakhtarī al-Murādī, Abū Baṣīr
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Layth b. al-Bakhtarī al-Murādī, Abū Baṣīr

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 7. Aḥmad b. Hilāl, al-ʿAbartā’ī, Abū Jaʿfar
hadiths.ar: 7 - أحمد بن هلال، العبرتائي، أبو جعفر. أرى التوقف في حديثه، إلا في ما يرويه عن الحسن بن محبوب من كتاب " المشيخة "، ومحمد بن أبي عمير من " نوادره " وقد سمع هذين الكتابين جلة أصحاب الحديث واعتمدوه فيهما. ولد سنة ثمانين ومئة، ومات سنة سبع وستين ومئتين.
hadiths.en: 7 – Aḥmad b. Hilāl, al-ʿAbartā’ī, Abū Jaʿfar.  I regard halting (to be appropriate) in regards to his ḥadīth, except for what he narrates from al-Ḥasan b. Maḥbūb from the book al-Mashīkha and Muḥammad b. Abī ʿUmayr from his Nawādir.  The venerable of the Aṣḥāb al-Ḥadīth have heard these two books and relied upon what is in them.  He was born in the year 180, and died in the year 267.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 7, H. 167
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: Aḥmad b. Hilāl, al-ʿAbartā’ī, Abū Jaʿfar
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Aḥmad b. Hilāl, al-ʿAbartā’ī, Abū Jaʿfar

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 8. Aḥmad b. al-Qāsim b. Ṭarkhān, Abū al-Sarrāj
hadiths.ar: 8 - أحمد بن القاسم بن طرخان، أبو السراج. ضعيف.
hadiths.en: 8 – Aḥmad b. al-Qāsim b. Ṭarkhān, Abū al-Sarrāj.  Weak.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 8, H. 168
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: Aḥmad b. al-Qāsim b. Ṭarkhān, Abū al-Sarrāj
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Aḥmad b. al-Qāsim b. Ṭarkhān, Abū al-Sarrāj

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 9. al-Ḥusayn b. Mayyāḥ, al-Madā’inī
hadiths.ar: 9 - الحسين بن مياح، المدايني. روى عن أبيه. غال، ضعيف.
hadiths.en: 9 – al-Ḥusayn b. Mayyāḥ, al-Madā’inī.  Narrated from his father.  A ghālī, weak.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 9, H. 169
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: al-Ḥusayn b. Mayyāḥ, al-Madā’inī
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › al-Ḥusayn b. Mayyāḥ, al-Madā’inī

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 10. al-Ḥusayn b. al-Mukhāriq b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān b. Warqā b. Ḥabash, Abū Junāda, al-Salūlī
hadiths.ar: 10 - الحصين بن المخارق بن عبد الرحمان بن ورقاء بن حبش، أبو جنادة السلولي. ضعيف، وقال ابن عقدة: كان يضع الحديث. وهو من الزيدية، لكن حديثه يجيئ في حديث أصحابنا -.
hadiths.en: 10 – al-Ḥusayn b. al-Mukhāriq b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān b. Warqā b. Ḥabash, Abū Junāda, al-Salūlī.  Weak.  And Ibn ʿUqda said he used to fabricate ḥadīth.  He was from the Zaydīs, however his ḥadīth come in the ḥadīth of our companions.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 10, H. 170
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.

hadiths.chapter: 11. Rabiʿ b. Zakariyya, al-Warrāq (the papermaker)
hadiths.ar: 11 - ربيع بن زكريا، الوراق، كوفي. ضعيف.
hadiths.en: 11 – Rabiʿ b. Zakariyya, al-Warrāq (the papermaker).  Kufan.  Weak.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 11, H. 171
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.

reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Rabiʿ b. Zakariyya, al-Warrāq (the papermaker)

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 12. Sulaymān b. ʿUmar, Abū Dāwud, al-Nakhaʿī
hadiths.ar: 12 - سليمان بن عمر، أبو داوود، النخعي. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). حدثني أحمد بن محمد بن موسى، قال: حدثنا أحمد بن محمد بن سعيد، قال: كان أبو داوود النخعي يلقبه المحدثون: " كذاب النخع ".
hadiths.en: 12 – Sulaymān b. ʿUmar, Abū Dāwud, al-Nakhaʿī.  Narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh   . عليه السلام Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. Mūsā narrated to me, he said: Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. Saʿīd narrated to me, he said: The muḥaddiths used to nickname Abū Dāwud “the liar of al-Nakhaʿ”

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 12, H. 172
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: Sulaymān b. ʿUmar, Abū Dāwud, al-Nakhaʿī
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Sulaymān b. ʿUmar, Abū Dāwud, al-Nakhaʿī

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 13. Sulaymān b. Yaʿqūb, al-Nakhaʿī
hadiths.ar: 13 - سليمان بن يعقوب، النخعي. حدثني محمد بن الحسين بن محمد بن الفضل، قال: حدثني عبد الله ابن جعفر بن درستويه، قال: قال يعقوب بن سفيان: كان سليمان بن يعقوب النخعي يكذب على الوقف.
hadiths.en: 13 – Sulaymān b. Yaʿqūb, al-Nakhaʿī.  Muḥammad b. al-Ḥusayn b. Muḥammad b. al-Faḍl narrated to me, he said: ʿAbdullāh b. Jaʿfar b. Durustawayh narrated to me, he said: Yaʿqūb b. Sufyān said: Sulaymān b. Yaʿqūb al-Nakhaʿī used to keep to (? lie upon) the waqf.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 13, H. 173
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 14. ʿAlī b. Ḥassān, al-Wāsiṭī
hadiths.ar: 14 - علي بن حسان، الواسطي. من أصحابنا، ثقة، ثقة.
hadiths.en: 14 - ʿAlī b. Ḥassān, al-Wāsiṭī.  From our companions, thiqa thiqa.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 14, H. 174

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 15. Sālim b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān, Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān
hadiths.ar: 15 - سالم بن عبد الرحمان، أبو عبد الرحمان، الأشل. ثقة. روى عن أبي جعفر، وأبي عبد الله (عليهما السلام).
hadiths.en: 15 – Sālim b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān, Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān, the lame.  Thiqa.  Narrated from Abū Jaʿfar and Abū ʿAbdillāh .عليهما السbم

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 15, H. 175
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: Sālim b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān, Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Sālim b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān, Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 16. ʿAbd al-Karīm b. ʿAmr b. Ṣāliḥ, al-Khathʿamī
hadiths.ar: 16 - عبد الكريم بن عمرو بن صالح، الخثعمي، مولاهم، كوفي، يلقب " كراما ". الواقفة تدعيه، والغلاة تروي عنه كثيرا.
hadiths.en: 16 - ʿAbd al-Karīm b. ʿAmr b. Ṣāliḥ, al-Khathʿamī, their client.  Kufan.  Had the laqab of “Karrām”.  The Wāqifa claim him (as one of their own), and the ghulāt narrate a lot from him.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 16, H. 176
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 17. ʿAbd al-Ḥamīd b. Abī al-Daylam
hadiths.ar: 17 - عبد الحميد بن أبي الديلم - وهو ابن عم معلى بن خنيس -. ضعيف.
hadiths.en: 17 - ʿAbd al-Ḥamīd b. Abī al-Daylam – and he is the son of the uncle of Muʿallā b. Khunays.  Weak.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 17, H. 177
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 18. Muḥammad b. Aslam, al-Ṭabarī, al-Ḥalabī, Abū Jaʿfar
hadiths.ar: 18 - محمد بن أسلم، الطبري، الحلبي، أبو جعفر، أصله كوفي، كان يتجر إلى طبرستان. غال، فاسد الحديث. روى عن الرضا (عليه السلام).
hadiths.en: 18 – Muḥammad b. Aslam, al-Ṭabarī, al-Ḥalabī, Abū Jaʿfar.  His origin was Kufan.  He used to do commerce to Tabaristan.  A ghālī, corrupt in ḥadīth.  He narrated from al-Riḍā . عليه السلام

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 18, H. 178
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 19. Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. ʿAbdullāh, al-Jaʿfarī
hadiths.ar: 19 - محمد بن الحسن بن عبد الله، الجعفري. روى عنه علي بن محمد العبيدي صاحب الزنج بالبصرة، وروى عنه عمارة بن زيد - أيضا -. وهو منكر الحديث.
hadiths.en: 19 – Muḥammad b. al-Ḥasan b. ʿAbdullāh, al-Jaʿfarī.  Narrated from ʿAlī b. Muḥammad alʿUbaydī, the Ṣāḥib of the Zanj in Basra.  ʿUmāra b. Zayd narrated from him – also – and he is one whose ḥadīth is denied.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 19, H. 179
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 20. Muḥammad b. Muṣādif
hadiths.ar: 20 - محمد بن مصادف، مولى أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). روى عن أبيه. ثقة.
hadiths.en: 20 – Muḥammad b. Muṣādif, client of Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  He narrated from his father.  Thiqa.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 20, H. 180
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
